evidence_rows.reading: V1.12G opened lawfully as a same-scope semantic rerun phase.
The catalyst-state semantics are now explicit rather than implicit design notes.
The same-scope rerun now gives a before/after basis for semantic feature value.

interpretation: V1.12G succeeds once semantic v2 can be expressed and rerun on the same dataset.
The next decision should come from the observed delta, not from a generic belief that more features are always better.
The lawful next posture is owner review before label or scope changes.
